metadata.description: Dag Book Crafter marketplace — installs the dag-book-crafter plugin, a multi-skill pipeline that writes short, topical, scripture-anchored books in the Dag Heward-Mills teaching style and formats them as .docx.

plugins.name: dag-book-crafter
plugins.description: Writes short, topical, scripture-anchored books in the Dag Heward-Mills teaching style.
